title: Feature-Target P-Value Screening
objective: Screen each predictor for exploratory association with binary disease status.
method: Used Mann-Whitney U tests for numeric variables and chi-square tests for categorical variables.
results: Smallest unadjusted p-value is for cp using Chi-square: p=7.04e-58.
warnings: Missing values and site-level sampling differences may affect all estimates.
P-values are exploratory, unadjusted here, and sensitive to cohort/site imbalance.
